mapper.sql: id, stock_code, current_price, open_price, high_price, low_price, dynamic_yield, trade_date, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM stock_realtime_quote WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT q.* FROM stock_realtime_quote q INNER JOIN ( SELECT stock_code, MAX(trade_date) AS max_date FROM stock_realtime_quote GROUP BY stock_code ) latest ON q.stock_code = latest.stock_code AND q.trade_date = latest.max_date
SELECT FROM stock_realtime_quote WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} AND trade_date = #{tradeDate} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_realtime_quote (stock_code, current_price, open_price, high_price, low_price, dynamic_yield, trade_date, update_time) VALUES (#{stockCode}, #{currentPrice}, #{openPrice}, #{highPrice}, #{lowPrice}, #{dynamicYield}, #{tradeDate}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_price = VALUES(current_price), open_price = VALUES(open_price), high_price = VALUES(high_price), low_price = VALUES(low_price), dynamic_yield = VALUES(dynamic_yield), update_time = NOW()

INSERT INTO stock_realtime_quote (stock_code, current_price, open_price, high_price, low_price, dynamic_yield, trade_date, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.stockCode}, #{item.currentPrice}, #{item.openPrice}, #{item.highPrice}, #{item.lowPrice}, #{item.dynamicYield}, #{item.tradeDate}, NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_price = VALUES(current_price), open_price = VALUES(open_price), high_price = VALUES(high_price), low_price = VALUES(low_price), dynamic_yield = VALUES(dynamic_yield), update_time = NOW()
